subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my God! Thou seest how the son of Mahmúd hath been seized with trembling and dismay, at the hand of hostile enemies
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی تری ان سلیل محمود قد اخذته الرجفه و الفجاه من کل عدو عنود و ضاق
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @prayer for protection, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for teaching, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
